description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On December 20, 2024 at 3:55 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Los Angeles, California was in a 
collision involving a fixed object (solar panel) in a parking lot at 8985 Venice Boulevard.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling through a parking lot at a low rate of speed when the front driver side of the Waymo AV made contact with 
the corner of a solar panel situated to the left of the Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in 
autonomous mode. The Waymo AV sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
